name: 21 Golf Pro Shop
about: 21 Golf Pro Shop is a modern, state-of-the-art golf driving range located in Palisades Park, New Jersey. The venue features 54 heated and covered bays with Toptracer technology and an automatic adjustable auto-tee system, operating year-round. In addition to the driving range, the facility offers private Golfzon simulator rooms and a cafe. It is situated in Bergen County, only 10 minutes from New York City, and provides a tech-driven golf experience for players of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: 54 heated bays open all year round
Toptracer technology with automatic tees in all bays
Golfzon simulators available for private bookings
On-site cafe for food and drinks

simulator_hardware.notes: World's Best Golfzon simulators in 3 large rooms

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site cafe, Cafe 21, offering food and drinks. There is no mention of a BYOB policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes on the simulators is not specified on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue promotes a family-friendly atmosphere with its heated bays and activities suitable for all ages.
